mapper.sql: id, user_id, column_id, subscription_time, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM column_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND column_id = #{columnId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.cover_image, c.article_count, c.read_count, c.sort_order, c.status, u.nickname, u.avatar, cs.subscription_time AS subscriptionTime FROM column_subscription cs LEFT JOIN `column` c ON cs.column_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.deleted = 0 AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY cs.subscription_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT user_id FROM column_subscription WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO column_subscription (user_id, column_id, subscription_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{columnId}, #{subscriptionTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM column_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND column_id = #{columnId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM column_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM column_subscription WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND deleted = 0
